headline: G7 at Evian lands on Lake Geneva; Trump touches down near Geneva; Macron's last G7
summary: G7 summit at Evian puts Geneva and Vaud under heavy security; Trump arrives, Macron frames his final G7, Geneva airport sees record state-aircraft traffic.

headline: Iran wanted to sign its US deal in Geneva as a symbol of multilateralism
summary: Le Temps reports Tehran pushed for Geneva as the venue for the US-Iran accord to signal commitment to the multilateral order; No-G7 protest policed without incident.

headline: Swiss National Council votes to send the new-nuclear bill back to the Federal Council
summary: In the summer session the Nationalrat returned the government bill to lift Switzerland's new-nuclear ban to the Federal Council, a procedural rebuff after last week's openness.

headline: S&P cuts canton of Geneva debt outlook to negative
summary: Standard & Poor's shifted the outlook on the canton of Geneva's debt to negative, warning on deteriorating public finances.

headline: Palantir wins a Pyrrhic legal case against Swiss magazine Republik
summary: US firm Palantir prevailed in court against Zurich outlet Republik, but coverage frames it as a Pyrrhic victory amplifying scrutiny of its Swiss footprint.

headline: US and Iran reach tentative deal to end war; Trump and Vance digitally sign; Hormuz reopening
summary: Washington and Tehran agreed a tentative Pakistan-mediated framework to end their 100-day war with Hormuz shipping resuming, but terms are unverified and Israel is excluded and critical.

headline: G7 leaders meet at Evian under shadow of US-Iran deal as relevance is questioned
summary: The G7 convened at Evian dominated by the US-Iran framework, with open debate over whether the bloc still shapes the global economy.

headline: Historic Kyiv monastery set ablaze in deadly Russian air attack
summary: A Russian strike on Kyiv hit and burned a historic monastery, described as a blow to Ukraine's cultural and religious heart, with reported deaths.

headline: UK Court of Appeal upholds ban on Palestine Action as terrorist group
summary: Britain's Court of Appeal ruled that proscribing Palestine Action under terrorism law was lawful, upholding the designation.

headline: DR Congo Ebola death toll rises to 181 in record daily jump
summary: The DRC reported a record single-day increase in Ebola cases, pushing the death toll to 181; experts call World Cup risk extremely low.

headline: Fortra BoKS Privileged Access Manager unauth OS command injection CVE-2026-9862 CVSS 9.8
summary: Critical unauthenticated OS command injection in Fortra BoKS autoregistration service; companion CVE-2026-9863 affects legacy client upgrade tooling.

headline: Responsive FileManager unauthenticated file-upload RCE CVE-2026-5482 CVSS 9.3
summary: Unauthenticated arbitrary file upload to RCE via dialog.php in the unmaintained Responsive FileManager 9.14.0; no vendor patch.

headline: AshAuthentication OAuth/OIDC account takeover CVE-2026-49757 CVSS 9.2
summary: Auth bypass by spoofing in Ash framework auth library matches users by email, enabling account takeover via OAuth2/OIDC sign-in.

headline: multer Express file-upload middleware DoS CVE-2026-5079 CVSS 7.5
summary: Denial of service via deeply nested multipart field names in multer 1.0.0-2.1.1 and 3.0.0-alpha.1.

headline: Quick.CMS plaintext-HTTP PHP object deserialization CVE-2026-11860 CVSS 7.5
summary: Quick.CMS deserializes user-controlled data over plaintext HTTP without integrity checks, allowing object injection.

headline: CacheRL trains small tool-calling agents near GPT-5 with 100x less compute
summary: Cached rollouts plus hybrid reward train small agent models to 92% process accuracy on multi-step tool-calling, approaching GPT-5.

headline: SuperThoughts compresses reasoning tokens into latent superposition
summary: Compresses consecutive chain-of-thought token pairs into single latent representations to halve sequential reasoning steps with stable supervision.

headline: Small LLMs: pruning vs training from scratch controlled study
summary: Token-matched study finds pruned Llama-3.1-8B initialization beats random init under equal token budgets, with the gap narrowing as tokens grow.

headline: Adaptive Nucleus Truncation for long-form reasoning
summary: Entropy- and difficulty-adaptive sampling truncation stabilizes long reasoning chains without retraining.

headline: BoRAD label-free multi-class anomaly detection
summary: Self-bootstrapped representations enable a single label-free one-for-all industrial anomaly detector across product categories.

headline: Poker Arena nine-axis strategic reasoning benchmark for LLMs
summary: No-limit Hold'em tournament with three-layer memory profiles LLM strategic reasoning under uncertainty across nine cognitive axes.
